next_action: Reject premature vector database or graph-store work, keep file-backed source-backed memory as the auditable substrate, and run the next bounded benchmark runner timeout/stability repair before adding storage infrastructure.
overclaim_boundary: File-backed memory is not the breakthrough by itself, and a benchmark suite still must not claim lift until clean live evidence passes the gate.
rationale: The current gap is not a missing vector store. Goal 025 shows dirty positive live evidence with failed tasks is no_lift evidence, and goal 026 routes the next step to live-suite registry and runner policy before new memory storage infrastructure.
